title: Ender Potions
description: Teleport to your friends (and all over the place?) with two new potions
body:
# Ender Potions

This mod adds two new ender-themed potions.

Fabric version requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib). Use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to change settings in-game.

NeoForge version has no dependencies. Use the Mods screen to change settings in-game.

Includes integration for [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) and [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper).

## Potion of Wormhole

Drinking the potion in multiplayer opens up a screen where you can choose a player to teleport to from a list of online players. This sends a teleport request to the selected player. The receiving player can accept the request by pressing Y (default keybind, configurable) to let you teleport to their location. If the request doesn't get accepted in 10 seconds, the request is declined and the potion gets refunded. The entire process is accompanied by action bar messages.

The potion does nothing in singleplayer or when there is only one player on the server.

Can be brewed in the brewing stand with awkward potions and an ender eye.

![wormhole_screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b34ae1acaf9877cb19dc49de9131a448f57bf56e_0.webp)
![teleport_request](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b121c93e4cdec8895765ab8c72121b0e38448856.png)
![wormhole_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f527a7a8f96e9fe9cb42e0670787f0ce113166.png)

## Potion of Teleportation

Drinking the potion teleports the player to a random location in a configurable radius. The default radius is 1000 blocks around the player. The randomly selected location will always be safe for the player to stand on.

Can be brewed in the brewing stand with awkward potions and a chorus fruit.

![teleportation_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c930eb2f112d2e922700c8981b09c789d0c924d3.png)
